SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2018 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO APR-12-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JUMA BYRD, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SUBSTITUTE SERVICE WAS UNTIMELY EFFECTUATED ON 2/19/18 OUTSIDE OF SAN FRANCISCO WHICH REQUIRES 30 DAYS IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HSIA, LAWRENCE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $81.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,081.00, FOR MEDICAL SERVICES PROVIDED AT SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
